org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.edge

Class EdgeFigure.SPainter

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.edge.EdgeFigure.SPainter
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    EdgeShadowPainter, LinearFeatureShadowPainter, ShadowPainter
    Enclosing class:
    EdgeFigure<E extends Edge<?,?,?,?>>

    protected class EdgeFigure.SPainter
extends Object
implements EdgeShadowPainter
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:01
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-fig

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Rectangle2f getDamagedBounds()
      Replies the bounds of the area that must be redrawn according to this shadow object and all other related shadow object.
      Figure getFigure()
      Replies the associated figure.
      Rectangle2f getShadowBounds()
      Replies the bounds of the shadow object.
      UUID getUUID()
      Replies the UUID of the associated figure.
      void moveControlPointTo(int index, float dx, float dy)
      Recompute the edge path with the specified translation of the control point.
      void moveFirstAnchorTo(float dx, float dy)
      Recompute the edge path with the specified translation of the first port.
      void moveSecondAnchorTo(float dx, float dy)
      Recompute the edge path with the specified translation of the second port.
      void moveTo(float dx, float dy)
      Recompute the decoration with the specified translation.
      void paint(ViewGraphics2D g)
      Method to paint the associated figure in shadow mode.
      void release()
      Release any resource associated to this painter.

      • getDamagedBounds

        public Rectangle2f getDamagedBounds()
        Description copied from interface: ShadowPainter
        Replies the bounds of the area that must be redrawn according to this shadow object and all other related shadow object.
        Specified by:
        getDamagedBounds in interface ShadowPainter
        Returns:
        the bounds of the shadow object.

      • moveFirstAnchorTo

        public void moveFirstAnchorTo(float dx,
                     float dy)
        Recompute the edge path with the specified translation of the first port. This function does not change the original element.
        Specified by:
        moveFirstAnchorTo in interface EdgeShadowPainter
        Parameters:
        dx - is the translation along x
        dy - is the translation along y

      • moveSecondAnchorTo

        public void moveSecondAnchorTo(float dx,
                      float dy)
        Recompute the edge path with the specified translation of the second port.
        Specified by:
        moveSecondAnchorTo in interface EdgeShadowPainter
        Parameters:
        dx - is the translation along x
        dy - is the translation along y

      • moveControlPointTo

        public void moveControlPointTo(int index,
                      float dx,
                      float dy)
        Recompute the edge path with the specified translation of the control point. This function does not change the original element.
        Specified by:
        moveControlPointTo in interface LinearFeatureShadowPainter
        Parameters:
        index - is the position of the control point.
        dx - is the translation along x
        dy - is the translation along y

      • moveTo

        public void moveTo(float dx,
          float dy)
        Recompute the decoration with the specified translation. This function does not change the original element.
        Specified by:
        moveTo in interface ShadowPainter
        Parameters:
        dx - is the translation along x
        dy - is the translation along y

      • paint

        public void paint(ViewGraphics2D g)
        Method to paint the associated figure in shadow mode.
        Specified by:
        paint in interface ShadowPainter
        Parameters:
        g - the graphic context.

        public void release()
        Release any resource associated to this painter.
        Specified by:
        release in interface ShadowPainter
